products.title: Louis Vuitton Trainer Black & White
products.description: The iconic LV Trainers are revisited this season in a combination of Monogram denim and Monogram-embossed grained calf leather. The contrasting colours and materials highlight the elaborate construction of this model, which was inspired by vintage basketball trainers. A single pair takes seven hours to stitch.

Nike Air Force 1 x Off x Louis Vuitton Brown Azur
products.description: Step up your style game with our premium, affordable footwear for men and women. From sleek sneakers to elegant heels, our collection boasts high-quality craftsmanship and timeless designs. With lightning-fast shipping within 1-3 working days, your perfect pair is just a click away.

products.title: Nike Air Force 1 x Off White x Louis Vuitton Black
products.description: The Louis Vuitton x Nike Air Force 1 Low “Black” is a special collaboration between the high fashion house and Nike that was directed by the late Virgil Abloh. First previewed in Louis Vuitton’s SS22 fashion show back in 2021, this sneaker puts a premium spin on the vintage basketball shoe. It features an all-black suede construction with Louis Vuitton’s monogram print stamped into the leather. Details from Abloh’s previous collaborations with Nike under his Off-White clothing brand appear on the shoe, including a small black hang tag on the Swoosh, and printed 'AIR' branding alongside classic Air Force 1 'AIR' detailing on the lateral side of the midsole.

products.title: Nike Air Force 1 x Off x Louis Vuitton Blue
products.description: The Louis Vuitton x Nike Air Force 1 Low is a special collaboration between the storied high fashion house and Nike that was directed by the late Virgil Abloh. Produced by Louis Vuitton, Nike, and Abloh in 2022, this low-top sneaker features a two-tone colour block design, in blue and white, that replicates the original Nike Dunk colourways from 1985. This highly sought-after collaboration features a white leather base with Louis Vuitton’s famous monogram print stamped into the material while a contrasting blue textile with the Parisian fashion brand’s aforementioned pattern is found on the overlays and Swoosh. Signature details from Abloh’s previous collaborations with Nike under his Off-White clothing brand include a lime green hang tag on the sides, and printed 'AIR' branding alongside classic Air Force 1 'AIR' detailing on the lateral side of the midsole.

products.title: Nike Air Force 1 x Off White x Louis Vuitton White
products.description: The Louis Vuitton x Nike Air Force 1 Low “White” is a special collaboration between the high fashion house and Nike that was directed by the late Virgil Abloh. First previewed in Louis Vuitton’s SS22 fashion show back in 2021, this sneaker puts a premium spin on the vintage basketball shoe. Based on the classic “White on White” colourway, it features crisp, all-white leather construction with Louis Vuitton’s monogram print stamped into the leather. Details from Abloh’s previous collaborations with Nike under his Off-White clothing brand appear on the shoe, including a small white hang tag on the Swoosh, and printed 'AIR' branding alongside classic Air Force 1 'AIR' detailing on the lateral side of the midsole.

products.title: Nike Air Force 1 x Off White x Louis Vuitton Green
products.description: The Louis Vuitton x Nike Air Force 1 Low is a special collaboration between the storied high fashion house and Nike that was directed by the late Virgil Abloh. Produced by Louis Vuitton, Nike, and Abloh in 2022, this low-top sneaker features a two-tone colour block design, in green and white, that replicates the original Nike Dunk colourways from 1985. This highly sought-after collaboration features a white leather base with Louis Vuitton’s famous monogram print stamped into the material while a contrasting green textile with the Parisian fashion brand’s aforementioned pattern is found on the overlays and Swoosh. Signature details from Abloh’s previous collaborations with Nike under his Off-White clothing brand include a lime green hang tag on the sides, and printed 'AIR' branding alongside classic Air Force 1 'AIR' detailing on the lateral side of the midsole.

products.title: Louis Vuitton Trainer Crystal  – Black Grey
products.description: Luxury meets edge in the Louis Vuitton Trainer Crystal – Black Grey , featuring a sleek two-tone design and hand-embellished Swarovski crystal monogram . Crafted for comfort and style, this limited-edition sneaker is a bold take on the iconic LV silhouette. Details: Black and grey premium materials Swarovski crystal LV monogram Cushioned sole for everyday wear Signature LV branding Limited release

products.title: Louis Vuitton Trainer Crystal  – Black
products.description: Bold and luxurious, the Louis Vuitton Trainer Crystal – Black features an all-black design adorned with shimmering Swarovski crystals . This exclusive sneaker blends streetwear style with high-end detail for a standout look. Details: Premium black leather & suede Swarovski crystal LV monogram Cushioned interior for comfort Durable rubber sole Limited edition release

products.title: Louis Vuitton Skate Crystal – Black Edition
products.description: Step into refined street luxury with the Black Edition of the Louis Vuitton Skate Crystal. Featuring an all-black design with hand-applied Swarovski crystals, this limited sneaker delivers bold elegance and premium craftsmanship in every step. Details: Black leather & suede construction Black Swarovski crystal LV monogram Cushioned interior for all-day comfort Durable skate-style sole Exclusive limited release

products.title: Louis Vuitton Skate Crystal – Blue Swarovski Monogram
products.description: Make a bold statement with this limited-edition Louis Vuitton skate sneaker, featuring a dazzling Blue Swarovski crystal monogram . Crafted from premium materials with a comfortable, padded fit, this piece blends luxury with streetwear edge. A must-have for collectors and style leaders alike.
